Operation 'queryTransaction' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about what details are returned and the practical use cases. Enhanced description specifies return information (payment status, amount, customer details, payment method) and provides context about when an AI agent should use this operation (verification, investigation). This improves AI agent interpretability for determining when to query transactions.

data.current_description: Queries the status and details of an existing transaction by its reference.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status and complete details of an existing transaction using its reference identifier. Returns transaction information including payment status, amount, customer details, and payment method. Useful for verifying payment completion or investigating transaction history.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about what details are returned and the practical use cases. Enhanced description specifies return information (payment status, amount, customer details, payment method) and provides context about when an AI agent should use this operation (verification, investigation). This improves AI agent interpretability for determining when to query transactions.

message: Operation 'createToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about the output (token identifier) and important side effects (PCI compliance, secure storage, avoiding sensitive data storage). Enhanced description specifies the return value (token identifier), explains the security benefit (avoiding direct card data storage), and clarifies the use case (recurring/future payments). This improves AI agent interpretability for understanding tokenization benefits and how to use the returned token.

data.current_description: Creates a token for a payment card to be used for recurring or future payments.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a reusable token from payment card details for recurring or future payments without storing sensitive card data. Returns a token identifier that can be used in subsequent payment requests. The token enables secure payment processing while maintaining PCI compliance by avoiding direct card data storage.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about the output (token identifier) and important side effects (PCI compliance, secure storage, avoiding sensitive data storage). Enhanced description specifies the return value (token identifier), explains the security benefit (avoiding direct card data storage), and clarifies the use case (recurring/future payments). This improves AI agent interpretability for understanding tokenization benefits and how to use the returned token.
